removepilot.description: Remove a specific pilot assigned to your account.

forcesync.description: ⚡ [Admin] Force an immediate synchronization with the official ranking portal.

manualregister.description: 👑 [Admin] Register a player via cache lookup.

manualpilot.description: 👑 [Admin] Manually link a pilot to a character owner.

options.pilot: Select the Discord user acting as pilot.

cleandb.description: 👑 [Admin] Remove all duplicate nickname entries from the database.

manualremove.description: 👑 [Admin] Completely remove a player's registration and profile.

manualremovepilot.description: 👑 [Admin] Manually remove a pilot from a character owner.

sendpanel.description: 📋 [Admin] Send a fixed registration panel to this channel.

listunregistered.description: 📋 [Admin] List members with role but no registration, optionally DM them.

pending.description: ⏳ [Admin] List all pending registration requests with time remaining.

fixnick.description: 🔍 [Admin] Auto-correct a member's nickname via fuzzy ranking match.

options.member: The member whose nickname needs fixing.
options.nickname: Optional: the correct nickname. If omitted, auto-detect from ranking.

manualforce.description: 👑 [Admin] Force register a member as permanent — no fuzzy/ranking checks.

removepilot.noPilots: ❌ You don't have any active pilots on your account.
removepilot.menuContent: 👇 **Pilot Management:** Select which pilot to remove from your account:
removepilot.success: ✅ **Pilot removed.** Their roles and nickname are being restored.
removepilot.error: ❌ This pilot is no longer linked to your account.

forcesync.log: ⚡ Administrator {tag} initiated a full database sync.
forcesync.success: ⚡ **Forced sync complete!** Latest rankings retrieved and roles updated.

manualregister.cacheFound: ✅ **Registered via Cache!** Profile linked to **{nickname}** under **{clan}**.

manualpilot.ownerNotRegistered: ❌ **{displayName}** does not have an active profile.
manualpilot.selfPilot: ❌ You cannot link a user as their own pilot.
manualpilot.limitReached: ❌ Admin Override Failed: Owner already has **4 pilots**.
manualpilot.alreadyLinked: ❌ This pilot is already linked to this owner.

manualremovepilot.ownerNotRegistered: ❌ **{displayName}** does not have an active profile.
manualremovepilot.notLinked: ❌ **{pilotDisplay}** is not linked as a pilot to this owner.

manualremove.noRegistration: ❌ This user has no valid registration records.
manualremove.confirm: ⚠️ Permanently remove **{username}**'s registration? This will clear all pilots, roles, and nicknames.
manualremove.success: ✅ **Success!** All records for **{username}** have been removed.

manage.actionPilotDesc: Unlink a pilot from this user
manage.actionClanDesc: Assign the member role to this user

manualforce.confirm: ⚠️ Force-register **{username}** as **{nickname}**? This sets nickname + member role immediately — no ranking check.
manualforce.success: ✅ **{nickname}** has been force-registered as permanent! Nickname + member role applied.

welcome.message:
👋 Hello {member}, welcome to our server!

⚠️ **Register only ONE account** — use your exact in-game character name!

📌 **How to get your roles:**
1️⃣ Click **👑 Register as Owner** below and type your in-game name.
2️⃣ Have pilots? The owner will receive a DM to approve them.
3️⃣ Need to remove a pilot? Use `/removepilot`.

Enjoy your stay! 🚀

logs.syncStart: ⏳ [Sync] Starting role and nickname update routine...
logs.fetchStart: 🚀 [Scraper] Fetching Top 1000 from the official website...
logs.gatewayWarning: ⚠️ [Gateway] Gateway busy. Falling back to cached member list.
logs.imposterDetected: ⚠️ [Security] Resetting impersonator nickname for {username} trying to impersonate {nickname}
logs.memberLeave: 🏃‍♂️ [Leave-Handler] Registered member {tag} left the server. Cleaning up registration and pilots.
logs.pilotCleaned: 🗑️ [Leave-Handler] Pilot {tag} removed due to owner leaving.
